MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY NATIONAL CAB COMPANY IS GRANTED AND CONTINUED TO MAR-24-2011 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 FOR TRIAL (PER STIPULATION BY THE PARTIES IN OPEN COURT). DEFENDANT WAIVED NOTICE. JUDGE DON MITCHELL, CLERK: S. RAVINANTAPRICHA, NOT REPORTED. (506)

NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT RETURNED UNDELIVERED SENT TO MARIUSZ PLUDER.

ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT NATIONAL CAB COMPANY PLUDER, MARIUSZ
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-12-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-12-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HAGOS, BIRHANEMESKEL TESHOME RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NATIONAL CAB COMPANY PLUDER, MARIUSZ $987.55 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,062.55, THE JUDGMENT RESULTED FROM A MOTOR VEHICLE ACCIDENT ON A CALIFORNIA HIGHWAY CAUSED BY THE DEFENDANTS OPERATION OF A MOTOR VEHICLE CAUSING PROPERTY DAMAGE IN EXCESS OF $750.00 AND BODILY INJURY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
